title: alsine jacquinii subsp. funkii
intro: Alsine jacquinii subsp. funkii, also known as Alsine funkii, is a type of flowering plant in the saxifrage family, native to mountainous regions in Europe. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating kidney and urinary issues, due to its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects. Alsine funkii is believed to have health benefits such as reducing blood pressure, alleviating symptoms of urinary tract infections, and helping to treat kidney stones. The plant is often prepared as an herbal infusion, decoction, or tincture, and may be combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
